scripts.check: npm run build --workspaces && npm run check --workspaces
scripts.demo:build: npm run build --workspace @waveary/core && npm run build --workspace @waveary/memory && npm run build --workspace @waveary/voice && tsc -p examples/tsconfig.json
scripts.web:build: npm run build --workspace @waveary/core && npm run build --workspace @waveary/memory && npm run build --workspace @waveary/voice && npm run build --workspace @waveary/web
scripts.web:dev: npm run build --workspace @waveary/core && npm run build --workspace @waveary/memory && npm run build --workspace @waveary/voice && npm run dev --workspace @waveary/web
scripts.web:preview: npm run build --workspace @waveary/core && npm run build --workspace @waveary/memory && npm run build --workspace @waveary/voice && npm run build --workspace @waveary/web && npm run preview --workspace @waveary/web
scripts.desktop:prepare: npm run build --workspace @waveary/core && npm run build --workspace @waveary/memory && npm run build --workspace @waveary/voice && npm run build --workspace @waveary/web && npm run build:server --workspace @waveary/web && node tools/prepare-desktop-runtime.mjs
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run desktop:prepare && npm run dev --workspace @waveary/desktop
scripts.desktop:pack: npm run desktop:prepare && npm run pack --workspace @waveary/desktop
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run desktop:prepare && npm run dist --workspace @waveary/desktop
scripts.test: npm run build --workspaces && npm run test --workspace @waveary/memory && npm run test --workspace @waveary/core && npm run test --workspace @waveary/voice && npm run test --workspace @waveary/web
